compiled_state.title: [af9e-77fc] RED: Write tests for migrate-runtime-refs.py (at repo root scripts/)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to do
Create tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py with failing tests for scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py which does not exist yet.

## Tests to write (import from migrate_runtime_refs)
- test_inject_plugin_root: script missing _PLUGIN_ROOT → declaration injected after shebang (or after set -e); idempotent
- test_inject_handles_set_e: #!/usr/bin/env bash + set -e → _PLUGIN_ROOT injected AFTER set -e
- test_replace_variable_anchored: $REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/foo.sh → ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/foo.sh
- test_replace_skips_comment: comment line # plugins/dso/... NOT modified
- test_derive_plugin_git_path: scripts that need git-relative paths get _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH="${_PLUGIN_ROOT#$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/}" derived from _PLUGIN_ROOT
- test_replace_git_relative: bare plugins/dso/ in git show/diff/case patterns → ${_PLUGIN_GIT_PATH}/
- test_replace_user_message: echo "run bash plugins/dso/scripts/foo" → echo "run bash ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/foo"
- test_dry_run_no_mutation: --dry-run makes no file changes
- test_idempotent: running twice = running once

## Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py (at REPO ROOT, NOT under plugins/dso/)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py
- [ ] Contains at least 9 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "def test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py | awk "{exit (\$1 < 9)}"
- [ ] All tests FAIL (RED) before implementation exists
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker
  Verify: grep "test-migrate-runtime-refs" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
